source: bench gain sweep on the REAL gearboxed motor (bench/sweep_gains.py)
notes: REAL-MOTOR VERIFIED — load these. velocity_kp IS the firmware Kd (velocity target hard-wired 0); position_ki is the firmware Ki. The sim-optimized values (kp 80 / kd 3.6) were REJECTED: on hardware the light 200KV over-speeds above kp~45 and rings from 100 Hz velocity-sensor noise, neither of which the smooth model captures. kd 1.5 beat higher damping (3, 4.5 = more ringing + slower); ki 0 confirmed. Base per-motor-type gains from the free bench actuator; expect minor adjustment under real joint load.
